category_sources: source_facts.description says forensic toolkit; official site describes The Sleuth Kit as command-line tools and a C library for analyzing disk images and recovering files.
display_name_sources: Official site labels the project “The Sleuth Kit”; source_facts.name is sleuthkit.
docs_sources: Official Sleuth Kit Documents page links tool docs, wiki help documents, reference documents, and library guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sleuthkit/sleuthkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official site describes command-line forensic analysis of disk images and recovering files; source_facts.executables lists many TSK CLI tools.
